purpose: Durable P19 aiflow queue for RPC Tier 1 release-train convergence after P18 completed Gateway and Cache remaining candidate evidence. P19 keeps Tier 1 promotion blocked until release-train and benchmark-budget evidence are attached by separate task commits.

submissionCommands: go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P19-01-P18-COMPLETION-HANDOFF -title "P18 completion handoff" -description "Mark P18 as the latest completed governance batch and open P19 for RPC Tier 1 release-train convergence." -kind governance -priority 100

go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P19-02-RPC-RELEASE-TRAIN-EVIDENCE-ATTACHMENT -title "RPC release-train evidence attachment" -description "Attach RPC unary and streaming release-train evidence, resolver and balancer contracts, deadline retry auth tracing matrix, and Kitex rollback boundaries without promoting Tier 1 prematurely." -kind governance -priority 99

go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P19-03-RPC-BUDGET-PROMOTION-BLOCKER-REVIEW -title "RPC budget promotion blocker review" -description "Review RPC benchmark budget promotion blockers and keep latency report-only unless allocation evidence clears bench-regression-check promotion criteria." -kind governance -priority 98
aiflowSubmission.runtimeStatePolicy: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, bench/current.txt, bench/regression-report.json, bench/summary.md, bin/gofly, and docs/superpowers remain ignored local evidence and must not be committed.
aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P19 tasks are submitted to ignored local aiflow runtime state and mirrored here as durable docs/reference evidence; each task must be completed in order and committed by the current agent or human only after its gate passes or an environment-limited downgrade is documented.

previousBatchHandoff.completionPolicy: P18 is treated as completed only when all three task rows in docs/reference/governance-p18-roadmap.json carry completion status, verification commands, and pending-current-commit placeholders owned by their per-task commits.
previousBatchHandoff.runtimeStatePolicy: Local .aiflow queue data is runtime evidence only; durable completion evidence belongs in docs/reference/governance-p18-roadmap.json and docs/reference/governance-boundary-inventory.json.

tasks.title: P18 completion handoff
tasks.objective: Convert P18 from active completed roadmap evidence into the latest completed governance batch and open P19 as the next active aiflow batch for RPC Tier 1 release-train convergence.
tasks.deliverable: P18 completed task evidence, P19 active roadmap, boundary inventory transition, dashboard convergence fields, and aiflow runtime-state exclusion proof.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after the P18 completion handoff and P19 active-batch evidence pass boundary inventory and governance report gates without staging ignored runtime state

tasks.title: RPC release-train evidence attachment
tasks.objective: Attach release-train evidence for unary, server-stream, client-stream, and bidi-stream RPC surfaces while preserving Tier 2 classification until budget evidence converges.
tasks.deliverable: RPC release-train evidence references, resolver and balancer contract coverage, deadline retry auth tracing matrix, and Kitex coexistence rollback path.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC release-train evidence passes rpc-boundary-check and bench-regression-check without claiming Tier 1 promotion

tasks.title: RPC budget promotion blocker review
tasks.objective: Review RPC benchmark budget blockers and decide whether any unary or streaming allocation row can move toward blocking coverage while latency remains report-only.
tasks.deliverable: RPC budget promotion blocker review, allocation blocking candidate policy, rollback note, and report-only latency release guardrail.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC budget review passes bench-regression-check and rpc-boundary-check with any promotion or hold decision recorded
